ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "raw_value" REAL /* Raw value of the metric */,
  "cumulative_value" REAL /* Cumulative value of the metric */,
  "cloglog_value" REAL /* Cloglog value of the metric */,
  "fractional_area" REAL /* Fractional area covered by the metric */,
  "training_omission" INTEGER /* Number of training set omissions */,
  "test_omission" INTEGER /* Number of test set omissions */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was evaluated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model for which the metric is recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., training, test, validation) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet, HDF5) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external, user upload) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
